title: Untrusted Assets, Save Parsing, Paths, Privacy, and Local Security
description: A mod folder escapes its root, decompression consumes memory, pickle loads scores, save files are unlimited, crash reports include home paths, and telemetry starts without consent. Learners cumulatively produce bounded local-data and privacy policy through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Identify protected player data and availability, untrusted files and paths, package supply chain, local attackers, and realistic consequences.
Constrain asset, settings, replay, and score paths to approved roots and reject traversal, symlink, type, and size violations.
Use bounded validated data formats, reject unsafe object loading, write atomically, and recover without hiding corruption.
